generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws fall short. The 2024 National Security Review found that 68% of thwarted attacks were stopped due to expanded domestic surveillance powers. We can't afford to weaken our defenses in the name of civil liberties when the stakes are this high. Our duty is clear: maintain strong security measures while ensuring proper oversight. #NationalSecurityFirst
